name: ccpocket
description: Mobile client for Codex and Claude — control coding agents from your phone via WebSocket bridge
readme_summary: CC Pocket is a mobile and desktop application that allows users to control coding agent sessions (Codex and Claude) remotely via a self-hosted WebSocket bridge server. It enables users to start, manage, and approve agent actions from their phone, tablet, or desktop, offering a seamless coding experience across devices.
key_features: Control Codex and Claude coding agents from mobile and desktop
Remote session management and action approval
Rich prompt writing with Markdown, voice, and image input
Parallel session management with separate worktrees
Machine management (host saving, discovery, SSH control)
Adaptive UI for various screen sizes (phone, tablet, desktop)
primary_use_case: Enabling developers to remotely control and interact with AI coding agents (like Codex and Claude) from their mobile devices or desktops, facilitating a more flexible and accessible development workflow.
cover_image_prompt: A split scene: on one side, a developer is comfortably lounging on a futuristic sofa, holding a sleek smartphone. On the phone screen, a vibrant, interactive interface shows lines of code being generated and approved by an AI assistant represented by a friendly, glowing orb. On the other side, a complex, abstract digital landscape of code and data flows, with the 'CC Pocket' logo subtly integrated into the environment. The developer's side is warm and inviting, while the AI's side is dynamic and technological. The overall style is a clean, 3D isometric illustration with a bright, optimistic color palette, emphasizing the ease of control and the power of AI coding assistance from anywhere.

name: docker-pi-hole
description: The official Pi-hole Docker image from pi-hole.net
readme_summary: This repository provides the official Docker image for Pi-hole, a network-wide ad blocker and DNS sinkhole. It allows users to easily deploy Pi-hole in a containerized environment for efficient ad blocking across their entire network.
key_features: Volume persistence for data and configuration
primary_use_case: To provide a simple and reliable way to deploy Pi-hole as a network-wide ad blocker using Docker.
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant digital gatekeeper, represented as a stylized shield with a glowing 'P' emblem, standing guard over a network of interconnected devices. The gatekeeper is actively filtering incoming data streams, visually represented as a torrent of colorful packets. Malicious packets, depicted as dark, spiky shapes, are being repelled by the shield, while clean, safe packets pass through unimpeded. Subtle UI elements showing ad-blocking statistics and DNS queries are integrated into the background. The scene is set in a clean, modern digital space with a cool color palette and glowing accents, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style.

name: mgrep
description: A calm, CLI-native way to semantically grep everything, like code, images, pdfs and more.
readme_summary: mgrep is a command-line tool that enables semantic searching across various file types, including code, text, and PDFs, using natural language queries. It features background indexing, web search integration, and is designed for both human and agent use, aiming to reduce token usage for AI agents.
key_features: Semantic, multilingual, and multimodal search capabilities
Support for code, text, and PDFs (audio/video coming soon)
primary_use_case: To provide a natural language interface for searching and retrieving information from local files and the web, particularly useful for developers and AI agents.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian with a magnifying glass, not looking at a book, but at a swirling nebula of digital information composed of code snippets, document icons, and image thumbnails. The librarian points their magnifying glass, and a clear, glowing thread of understanding emerges from the nebula, forming a concise question like 'Where is the authentication setup?'. Subtle UI elements showing search results and file paths are visible on a nearby holographic display. The scene is set in a futuristic, calm library with soft, ambient lighting. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic, emphasizing clarity and intelligence.

name: letube-backend
description: 🎥 A simple video hosting service featuring live streaming and VOD, powered by HLS adaptive streaming, FFmpeg transcoding, and S3-based storage.
readme_summary: LeTube Backend is a microservices-based backend for a video hosting platform, supporting both Video on Demand (VOD) and live streaming. It leverages HLS for adaptive streaming, FFmpeg for transcoding, and S3-compatible storage for media files, with RabbitMQ for asynchronous task processing.
primary_use_case: To provide a robust and scalable backend infrastructure for a video hosting and live streaming platform.
cover_image_prompt: A digital alchemist in a futuristic workshop, meticulously transforming raw video footage (represented by a swirling vortex of unedited film reels) into polished, streamable content. The alchemist uses glowing tools to cut and shape the footage, which then flows through a series of pipes and conduits, emerging as perfectly formed HLS segments and live streams visualized as shimmering, adaptive waves. Small, holographic screens display progress bars and status updates, subtly hinting at the underlying technology. The workshop is filled with organized shelves of S3-like storage containers and a central console displaying the 'LeTube Backend' logo. The overall mood is one of efficient, high-tech creation, rendered in a vibrant, 3D isometric illustration style.

name: BRING
description: Next generation role-playing with LLM - with AI world and intelligent NPCs and multi-faceted Graph memory for all entities and a rich pipline and multi agent
readme_summary: BRING v2 is a production-ready, AI-powered platform for creating persistent fantasy worlds with interactive roleplaying. It combines generative world building, graph-based knowledge management, and LLM-driven narrative orchestration with FAISS-accelerated memory for intelligent NPCs and dynamic storytelling.
key_features: Graph-First Knowledge Management with self-healing graph
Living Narrative Director for dynamic story progression
Immersive Roleplay with LLM respecting player agency
Unified CLI and Web UI with dashboards
primary_use_case: Developing and playing in persistent, AI-driven fantasy role-playing games with rich narrative and intelligent NPCs.
cover_image_prompt: A master storyteller, depicted as a wise old librarian, sits at a grand, ancient desk. Before them, a swirling vortex of digital light emanates from an open book, transforming into a vibrant, living fantasy world teeming with characters, castles, and magical elements. The librarian's hands hover over the vortex, subtly guiding the narrative flow. Small, glowing UI elements representing memory graphs and probability dice float around the scene. The repository name 'BRING' is subtly etched into the desk. The overall mood is one of creation and emergent narrative. Style: 3D isometric illustration with a warm, magical lighting and a rich color palette.

name: GitOS
description: GitOS is an open-source OS project powered by global contributors. NASM bootloader, C++ kernel. Fork it, code it, submit a PR.
readme_summary: GitOS is an open-source operating system project built collaboratively by a global community. It features a custom bootloader written in NASM assembly and a modular kernel developed in C++, aiming for a minimalist, console-based user interface.
primary_use_case: Developing a custom, open-source operating system from the ground up through community contributions.
cover_image_prompt: A master craftsman meticulously assembling intricate clockwork gears, representing the core components of an operating system. One gear is made of etched metal (NASM Assembly), while another is a complex, glowing circuit board (C++ Kernel). Tiny digital blueprints and lines of code float around the scene, indicating the collaborative software development process. The craftsman is placing the final gear, causing a minimalist, glowing console interface to appear on a nearby screen. The overall mood is one of precision and creation, with a clean, focused composition. Rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with subtle technological accents and a cool, focused color palette.
